modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the VLOOKUP function in Excel

full_description_text:  
The user is seeking information about the VLOOKUP function in Excel.  
They want to understand what this function does.  
The inquiry was submitted through a self-service form.  
The user has limited technical knowledge regarding Excel functions.
